title: Define core domain types
brief: The Task and Store types and their JSON contract.
body:
# Core domain types

Defines `Task` (the record persisted in `tasks.json`) and the in-memory `Store`.

## Decisions

- `Status` is a nullable string so "unset" differs from empty.
- Field validation happens via a JSON round-trip.

title: Persistent storage layer
brief: Load and save tasks.json with full validation.
body:
# Storage layer

Loads and saves `tasks.json`, runs dependency and cycle validation, and writes atomically (temp + rename).

## Notes

- Batch upserts validate all entries, then apply all-or-nothing.

title: CLI subcommands
brief: upsert, get, list, set-phase, merge, rerender.

title: HTTP API server
brief: Expose the wiki over a small HTTP API.
body:
# HTTP API

A thin HTTP layer over the same storage and validation the CLI uses.

## Endpoints

- `GET /tasks` — list
- `POST /tasks` — upsert
- `POST /tasks/{slug}/phase` — set status

title: API authentication
brief: Token-based auth for the HTTP API.

title: Spike: GraphQL endpoint
brief: Throwaway experiment, off the critical path.
body:
# GraphQL spike

A quick experiment to gauge whether a GraphQL endpoint is worth it. Isolated: nothing depends on it.
